indication: Treatment of postmenopausal women with oestrogen receptor positive, locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer for disease progression on or after adjuvant anti-oestrogen therapy.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved fulvestrant for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of estrogen receptor positive, locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer for disease progression on or after adjuvant anti-estrogen therapy in patients who are postmenopausal women.

document.name: Fulvestrant Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
document.description: Fulvestrant Therapy, 2026, version number 4, NCCP National SACT Regimen, NCCP, viewed 26/03/2026, https://healthservice.hse.ie/documents/6816/361_Fulvestrant_Therapy.pdf
